news_angle: The U.S. government has officially launched a new AI clearinghouse through a coalition of federal departments aiming to maintain AI leadership.
why_this_is_news: This is a fresh federal initiative marking a coordinated effort among key departments to centralize AI resources and oversight, highlighting ongoing government involvement in AI development.
specific_subject: U.S. departments of Treasury, Defense, and Homeland Security
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a street-smart cat launching a high-tech command center to monitor and lead a futuristic AI race
image_prompt: A youthful, athletic orange tabby cat with sharp tabby markings and fluffy cheeks, wearing a sleek black hoodie, cap tilted sideways, and futuristic glasses, dynamically posing in front of a glowing digital command hub filled with AI symbols and high-tech screens showing neural networks and data streams. The background features a dark urban rooftop at night with subtle cyberpunk neon lighting. The cat’s mischievous confident grin shows readiness to dominate the AI race.
easter_eggs: hidden small robotic mouse design in the cyberpunk background
stylized AI chip pattern in the cat's hoodie texture
caption: The U.S. has kicked off a new AI clearinghouse combining power from Treasury, Defense, and Homeland Security. Hunk Mao’s ready with the tech street smarts to keep America at the top of the AI game!
risk_notes: Ensure the cat character remains playful and non-political, avoiding any direct references that could be interpreted as partisan. Keep focus purely on AI leadership without endorsing any political figures.
